name: Torrent Capital Ltd.
description: Torrent Capital Ltd. is a publicly traded investment company and merchant bank based in Halifax, Canada. The firm specializes in actively managing a portfolio of Canadian small-cap equities across various sectors, including disruptive technologies, digital assets, and resource exploration. By balancing growth and diversification, Torrent Capital invests in both public and private companies, providing high-conviction, deeply researched positions. Additionally, the company offers merchant banking and advisory services for corporate finance and capital markets, leveraging a leadership team with extensive experience in building and financing companies to drive value creation for its shareholders.
